task: Find 10 papers related to web agents published on arXiv between January 2023 and September 2024 (based on the submission time of the first version). For each paper, provide the paper name, a link to the pdf, the name and the affiliation of the first author and submission time of the first version on arXiv.
graderReasoning:
The user requested 10 papers related to web agents published on arXiv between January 2023 and September 2024. For each paper, the agent needed to provide the paper name, a link to the PDF, the name and affiliation of the first author, and the submission time of the first version on arXiv.

The agent successfully identified 10 relevant papers within the specified date range. It systematically extracted all the required information for each paper: paper name, PDF link (constructed from the arXiv ID), first author's name, their affiliation, and the first version's submission date. The agent demonstrated good problem-solving by adapting its strategy when direct browser interaction tools (`openTab`, `repl`) encountered technical issues. It effectively used `websearch` and `webfetch` to gather the necessary data, including searching for author affiliations when not directly available on the arXiv abstract page. The final output is well-structured and complete, meeting all user requirements.
